reviews.review_description: Please make it instead of getting seen and losing, you go into combat mode and if you die you lose. Great game btw!
Please don't abandon this 🙏 please add more
But there’s an issue every time I stare at enemy in front of him it won’t fight back

reviews.review_title: good game but a few suggestions
reviews.review_description:
Ideas:

Gore

Hook blade

Multiplayer 

grappling hook 

Hand to hand combat 

Mods

More maps

More game modes (like multiplayer)

Realistic graphics (and blood)

More parkour (wall running)

Kicking (I want to kick my enemy’s sooooooooooo

Add these thanks bye!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and suggestions! Some of these are already on my roadmap :D

reviews.review_description: I really don’t know what to say, great game, so much room for improvement obviously, i just love it! now of course there is going to be bugs, of course there is going to be fixes, keyword “Early Access”

reviews.review_title: The best rip off assassins creed vr game
reviews.review_description: YOU SHOUD BUY THE GAME SO WHAT IF THE GRAPHICS IS BAD THE GAME PLAY IS THE BEST 👌🏽 👍🏽 😍
One of the best and most fun games I have ever played

reviews.review_title: a very good stealth assassin game!
reviews.review_description: this game has been extremely fun over the time ive been playing it, plus its got a LOT of potential for new features and some cool stuff you could do! you dont even have to do stealth, you can just do whatever in sandbox which is my favorite part. its got some of the better bow stuff in vr ive seen as well, if you have 7 dollars i recommend buying it!

Is 
gooooooooooooooooooooooooooo oooooooooooooooooooooooooood

This game is a really good game, I got it a few days ago and judging on the price and how it's on applab I thought it would be really bad but for an app on applab it's actually really good quality, haven't come across any bugs yet. I just think it's just the lack of content that means I can give it 5 stars there's only really a few things you can do and I can see it getting boring after a while

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! The game is still young in early access, but new content is getting added so keep an eye out! :) Join the discord server for the latest updates!

reviews.review_description: I don’t like how every time you get seen the game just restarts that would be cool if they would fight you or something so the game isn’t walk restart walk

developer_response.body: I will be adding a combat mode in the future, it's on the roadmap after the new map and a couple of other things :)

reviews.review_description: The game is great and I totally recommend it but there is a feature you should add, you should be able to be detected and be able to fight your way out. Right now if you get detected you fail but I feel like adding this could make it more realistic feeling. You should also make it available to vault over objects. This would add more parkour features to the game therefore making it better. That’s all I have to say KEEP UP THE GOOD WORK!!!

Been playin for a bit and the game is fantastic climbing and combat are great.One thing I would like you to see is a sort of grappling hook (yes I know everyone wants that) but it would just fit so well. There is also a glitch where when I put on a hidden blade it will just stop appearing and not work. I would also like a story not anything crazy just so that I feel I have a reason for killing random people.and a new map would be amazing. I know the game is in early access and I’m asking a lot. But these are just suggestions in case you need ideas.  Great game hope to see more in the future
Also when is the next update? ( if u don’t know that’s fine)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!

Good suggestions :) The hidden blade glitch will be fixed in the next update... which is planned for this week assuming I get enough time to finish off the new map!

reviews.review_description: The game is good, no doubt! But honestly, just eait for assains creed and she'll put 50$

Hey mate I’ve been talking to your through YouTube response on a video asking about where the hidden blades are thanks for telling me also do you have any other games I would love to play more of what you made

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! :) Haven't made anything else before I'm afraid, this is my first game.

reviews.review_title: good game but has some flaws
reviews.review_description: amazing game! climbing mechanics are great, killing mechanics are decent and maps are amazing. the only bad thing i have with this game is where when you get seen you immediately fail i wish they try to fight back or tell other people but still really good assassins creed type style game (add a grappling hook please)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! A combat update is planned, it's the #1 requested feature so I am implementing it after the new map!

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best games on applab, the stealth is amazing and the hidden blades are so cool, if your thinking on buying this game give a shot one of the best things I’ve ever played
